description: Create a 'Transistor LED Driver' electrical schematic in Wondershare EdrawMax titled 'NPN LED Driver Schematic'. The circuit must include a 9V DC Voltage Source (Label: '9V'), a Switch (Label: 'SW1'), a 1k Resistor (Label: '1k'), an NPN Transistor (Label: '2N2222'), an LED (Label: 'Status LED'), a 330R Resistor (Label: '330R'), and a Ground connection (Label: 'GND'). Configure the wiring so that the 9V (+) connects through SW1 and the 1k Resistor to the Transistor Base; the 9V (+) connects through the 330R Resistor to the LED Anode; the LED Cathode connects to the Transistor Collector; the Transistor Emitter connects to Ground; and the 9V (-) connects to Ground. Save the schematic to /home/ga/Diagrams/led_driver_schematic.eddx and export it as an image to /home/ga/Diagrams/led_driver_schematic.png.
